steps.title: Identify the examination action
steps.content: The crucial clue is that physicists “closely examine the behavior of subatomic particles.” The blank must name this exact action: careful examination of something.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Inspecting” means examining something carefully—precisely the action described. The other choices describe different actions: “selecting” means choosing, “creating” means making, and “deciding” means making a judgment. This matches choice B — B is correct.
